scope: query-classifier, health-probe, tool-router semantic routing, CLI preflight, fail-open

acceptance_criteria.test_name: [P0] AC-001-01: Given all dependencies present and generation succeeds, When isdlc-embedding generate runs, Then exit code 0 and verified .emb output exists

then: user sees the missing dependency BEFORE generation is attempted

acceptance_criteria.test_name: [P0] AC-001-02: Given @huggingface/transformers not installed, When preflight() runs, Then exit code 2 and stderr contains missing dependency message

acceptance_criteria.description: Generation failure shows failure banner, not success

then: banner shows failure marker with the failure reason, not success

acceptance_criteria.test_name: [P0] AC-001-03: Given generation runs but output is empty (0 chunks), When post-verify runs, Then exit code 1 and stderr contains empty output message

acceptance_criteria.description: Opted-out embeddings skip generation with opt-out banner

then: generation is skipped and banner shows opt-out marker

acceptance_criteria.test_name: [P2] AC-001-04: Given embeddings opted-out in config, When Step 7.9 runs, Then generation is skipped and banner shows opt-out marker

acceptance_criteria.description: Natural-language Grep queries route to semantic search

given_when_then.given: isdlc-embedding MCP registered and server healthy
given_when_then.when: a Grep call fires with a natural-language query

acceptance_criteria.test_name: [P0] AC-002-01: Given isdlc-embedding MCP registered in settings.json, When inferEnvironmentRules() is called, Then returns a rule with id 'inferred-semantic-search'

acceptance_criteria.description: Exact symbol patterns fall back to lexical

given_when_then.when: a Grep call fires with an exact symbol pattern
then: it falls back to lexical with reason shown

acceptance_criteria.test_name: [P0] AC-002-02: Given a camelCase symbol 'inferEnvironmentRules', When classifyQuery() is called, Then returns { type: 'lexical', reason: 'camelCase' }

acceptance_criteria.description: Server-down Grep calls fall back to lexical

then: routing falls back to lexical with [Lexical fallback: server unavailable]

acceptance_criteria.test_name: [P0] AC-002-03: Given no PID file exists, When probeEmbeddingHealth() is called, Then returns { status: 'inactive', error: 'no_pid_file' }

acceptance_criteria.description: Routing messages show semantic or lexical fallback labels

then: message includes either [Semantic search] or [Lexical fallback: {reason}]

acceptance_criteria.test_name: [P1] AC-002-04: Given routing to semantic search, When formatWarnMessage() is called, Then message contains '[Semantic search]'

acceptance_criteria.description: Probe timeout falls back to lexical without blocking

then: treats status as 'failed' and falls back to lexical

acceptance_criteria.test_name: [P1] AC-002-05: Given health probe encounters unexpected error, When probeEmbeddingHealth() is called, Then returns { status: 'failed' } and never throws

acceptance_criteria.description: Embedding generation failure never blocks discover
acceptance_criteria.test_name: [P0] AC-003-01: Given embedding generation fails during discover, When Step 7.9 completes, Then discover continues to finalize and never blocks

acceptance_criteria.description: Health probe timeout/error never blocks tool calls

given_when_then.given: health probe times out or errors

acceptance_criteria.test_name: [P0] AC-003-02: Given health probe times out, When tool-router evaluates routing, Then falls back to lexical within total budget

acceptance_criteria.description: MCP failure falls back to Grep without crash or retry

given_when_then.given: isdlc-embedding MCP is registered but server is down
then: agent naturally falls back to Grep

acceptance_criteria.test_name: [P0] AC-003-03: Given isdlc-embedding MCP registered but server down, When semantic search MCP call fails, Then agent falls back to Grep with no infinite retry
